div1.entryFree: Cómmune (in Wint. perhaps commúne) to converse, to take counsel: I would c. with you of such things, Meas. IV, 3, 108. I have more to c. with Bianca, Shr. I, 1, 101. what need we c. with you of this, Wint. II, 1, 162. I must c. with your grief, Hml. IV, 5, 202. (In H5 III, 1, 7 O. Edd. c., M. Edd. rightly summon).
